comment: Field-replay live-lane scheduled-cost envelope (plan replay-corpus-gate-2026-07 Item 3). Prices filled 2026-07-16 from the official Anthropic pricing page (platform.claude.com/docs pricing) for the two pinned routing models. usd_to_gbp is deliberately HIGH (over-estimates GBP cost). Any change to this file is a reviewed version bump that resets advisory GREEN chains (the version is a behaviour_fingerprint component).
output_ceiling_rule: output >= max_rounds(8) * max_tokens(4096) = 32768 (LOOP_CAP and max_tokens are hard-coded in runToolLoop and not pass-through)
retry_policy_note: installed Anthropic SDK defaults maxRetries: 2, so one messages.stream() can issue up to three HTTP attempts; the envelope multiplies by this and the effective retry policy joins the cost projection and behaviour_fingerprint
planned_rotations_rule: ceil(days_in_budget_month / shard_count) = ceil(31/4) = 8 — over-covers a 31-day month so every envelope component over-estimates

first_run_projection.note: Foundation ships ZERO fixtures — the projection is recomputed by the nightly guard from the actual live-tagged fixture set before any vendor call; if it exceeds monthly_target_gbp the run STOPS and files the advisory issue.
